sectionTitle: I'm Going to Cast My Vote | 我要去投票

samples.pinyin: tā tóupiào zhīchí zhège tí'àn.

samples.sentence: 民眾/衆對政府的支持度提高。

samples.en: Public support for the government increased.

samples.pinyin: xuǎn mín de zhī chí dù zài shàng shēng
samples.en: The voters' support rating is rising.

samples.meaning: fail to be chosen; lose an election (opp. 入选, 当选)
samples.sentence: 他在選舉中意外落選了。

samples.meaning: to fail to be chosen (or elected)

samples.pinyin: Tā de dépiào lǜ hěn gāo.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yùqī míngtiān huì xiàyǔ.

samples.sentence: 公司預期銷售額會增加。

samples.en: The company anticipates an increase in sales.

samples.meaning: transient; temporary; for the time being
samples.pinyin: wǒ zànshí bùxiǎng chī.
samples.en: I don't want to eat for the time being.

samples.pinyin: wǒ hǎojiǔ méi huílǎojiāle.
samples.en: I haven't been back to my hometown for a long time.

samples.pinyin: chūnjié wǒ yào huí tàng lǎojiā.

samples.sentence: 藝術傢的形象非常獨特。

samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì xūyào hǎohǎo shāngliang.

samples.pinyin: nǐ hé tā shāngliangguòle ma?

items.vi: quan hệ; mạng lưới quan hệ

samples.pinyin: rénmài zài shāngyè zhōng hěn zhòngyào.
samples.en: Connections are very important in business.

samples.sentence: 她利用人脈找到了工作。

samples.sentence: 這個行業正處於弱勢期。

samples.sentence: 這支隊伍的錶現處於弱勢。

samples.pinyin: wǒ yǐjīng tuìxiū sān niánle.

samples.pinyin: tā zhuānzhù yú zìjǐ de shìyè.
